_schema.comment: Reverse-lookup catalog: vegan dishes a diner might crave, mapped to local restaurants that serve them. Restaurant fields (url, address, hours) are optional and should only be filled when verified — never guess. The `ratings` array is reserved for a future rating system; leave empty until that ships.

dish.name: display name
dish.description: 1-line plain-language description for the search card
dish.ingredients: array of plain ingredient/component words used for search matching
dish.tags: array of category tags, e.g. breakfast, savoury, brunch, sweet, drink
dish.flavors: optional array of strings — flavor / variant names a customer can pick at order time (e.g. vanilla, chocolate, strawberry). Distinct from `tags` which are dish-level categories.
dish.allergens: optional array of { name, optional } objects. `optional: true` means the allergen is only present in some configurations (specific flavor, specific milk choice, etc.). Omit the array entirely if no allergen info is verified.
dish.locallyMade: boolean — true if the dish is made in-house at the listed venues (vs. distributed from a central kitchen). Leave false if unverified.

restaurants.name: venue name (required)
restaurants.url: string | null — only set when verified
restaurants.address: string | null — only set when verified
restaurants.notes: string | null — anything diner-relevant (hours-limited, weekends-only, seasonal, etc.)
restaurants.ratings: array — reserved for future rating system; empty until ratings are shipped

dishes.name: Breakfast Burrito
dishes.description: Puff-pastry-wrapped breakfast burrito with hash browns, tofu, turmeric, green pepper, and asparagus. Locally made.

dishes.name: Milkshake
dishes.description: Thick dairy-free milkshakes with a rotating flavor selection. Pick your base milk at order time.
